title: Full Time Front of House
description:
Job Description & Requirements

We are seeking motivated individuals with an interest in fitness and strong interpersonal skills to deliver high-quality customer service and support the safe and efficient operation of our gym facilities.

Key Responsibilities:

As a front-of-house team member, you will be responsible for maintaining high service standards and operational efficiency. Your day-to-day duties will include:

Front Desk Operations:

  • Greet members and guests professionally and warmly
  • Manage membership registrations and enquiries (in-person, phone, email, and digital platforms)
  • Demonstrate integrity and strict adherence to operational policies, protocols, and guidelines.

Safety & Cleanliness:

  • Enforce safety and hygiene guidelines within the gym
  • Maintain the tidiness and cleanliness of all common areas and facilities
  • Assist with packing, cleaning, and moving of gym equipment as needed

Administrative & Reporting Duties:

  • Utilise required digital tools and platforms effectively in the performance of duties in terms of membership sale / management, scheduling, and incident reporting
  • Ensure proper handover between shifts (handover/takeover documentation)
  • Escalate any issues or incidents to the management team promptly


What We’re Looking For:

Skills & Attributes:

  • Strong communication, interpersonal, and problem-solving skills
  • Punctual, dependable, conscientious, and well-organised with a positive, can-do attitude
  • Enjoys personal interactions and have an approachable personality

Availability:

  • Able to work a fixed schedule of Sundays to Thursdays
  • Commitment to a minimum of 32.5 hours per week
  • Willingness to work across multiple gym locations in Central Singapore


Qualifications & Experience:

Required:

  • Minimum 1 year of customer service or front desk experience

Preferred:

  • Valid First-Aid and CPR Certification
  • Experience in fitness or wellness environments is a plus


Physical Requirement:

  • Able to walk around the gym facilities, climb stairs, lift, clean and pack heavy gym equipment

Remuneration and Employee Benefits:

  • Base Salary + Sales Commission
  • Complimentary usage of gym facilities at any Platinum Fitness outlet (when off duty)
  • Corporate discounts at partner retailers

Onboarding Date:

  • March 2026

postedCompany.description:
Platinum Fitness is Singapore's most prestigious boutique 24-hour fitness studio, serving individual members and freelance personal trainers.

From a single outlet established in 2018, we have opened 3 outlets in the last 3 years, all located in the heart of Singapore.

Be a part of a sustainable growth project.
postedCompany.name: PLATINUM FITNESS SG PTE. LTD.
